content:
A Policy Schedule or Policy Certificate is a document that summarizes all the key details of your LIC policy - the Sum Assured, premium amount, maturity date, nominee name, and more. You may need this for a loan application, tax filing, or simply to verify your policy details.

**What the policy certificate contains**

The LIC policy certificate or policy schedule includes:
- Policy number and date of commencement
- Name of the insured and proposer
- Plan name and number
- Sum Assured
- Policy term and premium payment term
- Annual/half-yearly/quarterly premium amount
- Maturity date
- Nominee name and relationship
- Assignment details (if any)

**How to get it online**

Step 1: Visit licindia.in.

Step 2: Register or log in with your policy number, date of birth, and registered mobile number.

Step 3: Once logged in, navigate to the Policy Details or Services section.

Step 4: Select the policy for which you need the certificate.

Step 5: Download the policy details document. This certified statement is accepted for most official purposes.

**Through the LIC mobile app**

Download the LIC of India app, log in with your credentials, and navigate to Policy Details. The app allows you to download a PDF of your policy summary.

**For clients serviced through my agency**

I can access your policy details through LIC's agent portal and provide you with a printed or digital copy of your policy information. This takes less than five minutes.

**If you have not registered online**

Visit your LIC branch with your policy number and ID proof. Ask for a Policy Statement. The branch will print it out for you immediately at no charge.

**What if you do not know your policy number**

This happens when clients inherit policies or have old policies where the original documents are missing.

1. Check old premium receipts - the policy number is printed on every receipt.
2. Log in to the LIC portal using your PAN card - LIC links all your policies to your PAN.
3. Call 022-68276827 (LIC customer service) with your Aadhaar or PAN.
4. Visit your branch with your Aadhaar - they can look up all policies linked to your identity.

For any help with accessing your LIC policy information online or offline, call 9415313434.
contentHi:
LIC पॉलिसी सर्टिफिकेट आपकी पॉलिसी की सभी जानकारी का सारांश है।

**ऑनलाइन कैसे पाएं**
licindia.in पर लॉगिन करें, Policy Details सेक्शन में जाएं, PDF डाउनलोड करें।

**ऐप से**
LIC ऑफ इंडिया ऐप, Policy Details, PDF डाउनलोड।

**पॉलिसी नंबर नहीं पता**
PAN कार्ड से LIC पोर्टल पर लॉगिन, या ब्रांच में Aadhaar लेकर जाएं।

मदद के लिए: 9415313434
